queries.question: Provide me with all nurses and also with all physician assistants who work with Anne Buche.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE Employees.MedicalProfession = "Nurse" OR Employees.MedicalProfession = "Physician's Assistant" AND Employees.Patient = "Anne Buche"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:MedicalProfession ?medicalprofession_w .
  ?employees p:MedicalProfession ?medicalprofession_w2 .
  ?employees p:Patient ?patient_w .
  FILTER((STR(?medicalprofession_w) = "Nurse" || (STR(?medicalprofession_w2) = "Physician's Assistant" && STR(?patient_w) = "Anne Buche")))
}

queries.question: Provide me with all nurses and physician assistants for Anne Buche.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE (Employees.MedicalProfession = "Nurse" OR Employees.MedicalProfession = "Physician's Assistant") AND Employees.Patient = "Anne Buche"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:MedicalProfession ?medicalprofession_w .
  ?employees p:MedicalProfession ?medicalprofession_w2 .
  ?employees p:Patient ?patient_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?medicalprofession_w) = "Nurse" || STR(?medicalprofession_w2) = "Physician's Assistant")) && STR(?patient_w) = "Anne Buche"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide me with all nurses and physician assistants for Anne Buche.
